creator: joh.hendriks@gmail.com
text:
On the following page the link to the english mailing lists points you to the handbook itself and not to the mailinglists list.
https://www.freebsd.org/community/mailinglists/

It directs you to https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/#eresources-mail
It should be https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/eresources/#eresources-mail

regards
Johan
